summary: Roadmap Pipeline Sync — embed automatic roadmap updates into brainstorming, execution, and autopilot skills so docs/roadmap.md stays current without manual sync

decisions.why: Covers entire feature lifecycle from conception to completion
Brainstorming adds features, execution syncs progress, autopilot marks phase/feature completion
Manual roadmap edits are never overwritten by automated sync
Roadmap is opt-in; skills should not error when it's absent
